description.value:
Soft-vowel glosses from valley storytellers — Sommerdalsmål valley storytellers use an ink pressed from summer flowers that carries the warmth of the growing season in its pigment; a speech made with this implement on hand feels like a day in a meadow, no matter how hostile the crowd.

Effect: Once per respite, you can shift the mood of a hostile crowd toward wary neutrality if you have at least a moment to speak. The Director determines how much the crowd's disposition shifts based on your approach and phrasing.

Rules: Director adjudicates; Respite.

project.prerequisites: An implement of at least basic quality; summer-flower ink from Sommerdal, sealed in a clay vial
